F19_1.name: No sleep / over-persistence
F19_1.effect: coherence cost explodes and closure risk increases

F19_2.name: Excess sleep / under-persistence
F19_2.effect: DeltaPhi becomes too weak and meaning/value formation fails

F19_3.name: Corrupted sleep
F19_3.effect: maintenance fails and drift increases upon waking

diagnostic_rule: Do not treat all persistence as good and do not treat all maintenance as collapse.
